englishDefinitions: A Christian phrase meaning to believe in Jesus personally and commit one's life to him.
To become a Christian in a personal, spiritual sense.
persianTranslation: عیسی را به قلب خود پذیرفتن
ایمان آوردن به عیسی و او را در دل پذیرفتن
examples: She said she wanted to accept Jesus into her heart.
Many churches invite children to accept Jesus into their hearts during a service.
For him, accepting Jesus into his heart marked the beginning of a new life.
